_observed: 2026-06-12 base6 paired sweep. A you-pick multi-listing (one listing fronting ten different cards) that briefly verified for base6-80-magnemite once the 'collection' keyword was suppressed — its aspects carried Language=English and Finish=Regular but no Set/Number, so absence-tolerant corroboration admitted it. The specific card's identity is never verifiable from a you-pick listing; the /\b(?:you|u)[\s-]*pick\b/ pattern in SET_AWARE_JUNK_PATTERNS drops it pre-getItem.
title: Pokemon Cards 2002 Legendary Collection Set 80-89/110 YOU PICK! NM+
